title: Credential stack + 90-day plan + Competency Tracker CSV
public_claim: This packet specializes in the credential/training architecture of a Russian-counterintelligence-focused CIA candidacy, assembled from a conversation in which the user explicitly rejected cyber/AI as primary tracks and insisted on non-coding preparation.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
